channel.title: Decision Labs Blog
channel.description: Insights on AI, machine learning, decision science, and the future of intelligent systems.

item.title: The Real Cost of Random I/O in Spatial Queries
item.description: Plan flips are normal in a cost-based optimizer, until they are not. The recent Clerk incident put attention back on a painful failure mode: a query crossing into a much worse plan after statistics/cost assumptions shift, causing a database
item.author: Decision Labs

item.title: AI Deepfakes From Space — Recorded at Web Summit Qatar 2026
item.description: Recorded live at Web Summit Qatar 2026, Shoaib Burq joins Ania Lichtarowicz — former BBC journalist and host of the 'Somewhere on Earth' Global Tech Podcast — to discuss the growing threat of AI-generated and manipulated satellite imagery. He explains how the ESA-backed Verisat AI project detects hidden fingerprints left by generative diffusion models — helping governments, journalists, and humanitarian organisations tell real Earth observation data from artificial deception.
item.author: Decision Labs

item.title: Working With Geospatial Embeddings With PostGIS And PGVector
item.description: In this talk, we share how we built geospatial embeddings directly into Geobase.app, our geospatial backend. By extending PostGIS with PGVector, we enabled semantic search and similarity queries over maps, rasters, and vector data sets. We’ll walk through the technical design choices, from embedding generation to storage and retrieval, and show how these capabilities power real-world use cases, such as neighborhood similarity, environmental monitoring, and AI-driven geospatial assistants. The session will highlight lessons learned in integrating modern AI/ML methods with a Postgres-native stack, making advanced retrieval workflows accessible to developers and analysts.
item.author: Decision Labs

item.title: PostGIS Day 2025 Talk Now Live - Working with Geospatial Embeddings
item.description: Watch our talk from PostGIS Day 2025 on working with geospatial embeddings and how they're transforming spatial data analysis.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: GeoEmbeddings Private Beta - Join Early Access 🚀
item.description: We're excited to announce the private beta for GeoEmbeddings. Join early access to explore geospatial embeddings and transform how you work with spatial data.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: Announcing the Release of geoai.js 🚀
item.description: We're thrilled to announce the release of geoai.js, a powerful JavaScript library for geospatial AI applications. Build intelligent spatial applications with ease.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: Geobase now supports DuckDB 1.1.3 🎉
item.description: We're excited to announce that Geobase now supports DuckDB 1.1.3, bringing enhanced performance and new features to your geospatial workflows.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: We launched! Join us for Beta!
item.description: After months of development, we're excited to announce that Geobase is now in beta! Join us and help shape the future of geospatial infrastructure.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: Announcing the Globhe Partnership
item.description: We're excited to announce our partnership with Globhe, bringing together cutting-edge geospatial infrastructure with innovative drone data solutions.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: Pushing the boundaries of geo data with motherduck and geobase!
item.description: Explore how we're pushing the boundaries of geospatial data processing by combining MotherDuck's analytics capabilities with Geobase's spatial infrastructure.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: Blueprints - Prebuilt Applications Templates
item.description: Introducing Blueprints: prebuilt application templates that help you get started with Geobase quickly. Build production-ready geospatial applications in minutes.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: How Geobase is Democratizing Access to the Geospatial Industry
item.description: Learn how Geobase is making geospatial technology more accessible, breaking down barriers and empowering developers to build powerful spatial applications.
item.author: GeoBase

item.title: Our goals and vision for Geobase
item.description: Discover our mission, goals, and vision for Geobase. Learn how we're building the future of geospatial infrastructure and making spatial data accessible to everyone.
item.author: GeoBase
